name: Forth Corporation Public Company Limited
summary: Forth Corporation Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes telecommunication and electronic equipment, and assembly electronic parts in Thailand. Its Electronics Manufacturing Service Business segment designs, manufactures, and assembles circuit boards and electronic equipment; and supplies and distributes semiconductor parts, such as IC, transistor, diode, optoelectronics display device relay, battery, connector, electric buzzer, power switch, EMC, filter, thermal printer, capacitor, resistor, crystal oscillator, etc. The company's Enterprise Solutions Business segment engages in the design, system implementation, installation, and maintenance of telecommunication network and information systems; vehicle tracking systems distribution services; and data transmission devices distribution services; enterprise resource management systems; electronic meters distribution services; LED lighting products and lighting equipment procurement and distribution services; aircraft distribution and maintenance repair, and operations services; and traffic system distribution services. This segment also offers smart grid solutions; and Forth Taglock EM, an electronic ankle harness used for track and monitor temporarily released suspects or defendants. Its Smart Service Business segment provides electronic payment acceptance, bill payment, and electronic money services, as well as personal loans; sells canned or bottled beverages, snacks, consumer products, and coffee through vending machines; offers mobile, e-wallet, and game top-up services, utility and phone bills payment service, and money deposit services; and provides electric vehicle charging equipment under the EV NET. The company also provides consulting services for information management and computer software management; engineering; and e-commerce services. Forth Corporation Public Company Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
